subject: WS1.3 commit already completed before STOP was observable
body: STOP received at inbox check while git commit was already inside the pre-commit hook. I attempted to interrupt immediately, but the exec wrapper had closed stdin; polling then showed the hook and commit had already completed cleanly. Resulting SHA is 87e21125 (feat(graph-core): add DatasetCore + DataFactory (WS1.3)). I did not use --no-verify and did not touch Vining's agent-tools files. Completing commit-queue/claim lifecycle now and will await owner/Brazen direction for any follow-up.
